failure_movement.justification: All three directional claims failed: 'unknown' predicted to shrink 3-6 but GREW by +14 (34->48); 'wrong' predicted to shrink 2-4 but unchanged at 10; 'empty' predicted stable/shrink 0-1 but shrank by 4 (7->3, correct direction but magnitude missed). Only empty got direction right.

trace_movement.justification: All token claims contradicted by data: prompt tokens predicted to RISE 5-15% but FELL 6.4% (1408->1319); completion tokens predicted LONGER for high-confidence hits but FELL 8% (163->150). Retrieval count unchanged (15.19 both), contradicting fewer-hits claim.

side_effects.justification: Predicted prompt crowding risk (didn't occur—tokens fell), wrong list item extraction (wrong cluster unchanged), and hallucinated answers from softer abstention (didn't occur—unknown grew instead). Missed major regressions: multi-session -0.26 (0.407->0.148) and temporal-reasoning -0.15 (0.231->0.077).
